title: Password reset link expired
body: User cannot use the password reset email because the link times out
resolution: Issued a fresh reset link and extended token expiry

title: MFA code not received on new phone
body: User changed phones and the sign in verification code never arrives
resolution: Rebound the authenticator app and completed MFA re-enrollment

title: Account locked after too many attempts
body: Payroll portal now says the account is locked after repeated login failures
resolution: Unlocked the account and updated the saved credential flow

title: SSO loop on HR portal
body: Employee signs in and gets sent back to the login screen again
resolution: Cleared stale SSO cookies and refreshed the identity claim mapping

title: VPN disconnects every ten minutes
body: Remote tunnel drops during calls and reconnects repeatedly
resolution: Updated the VPN client and disabled power saving on the adapter

title: Cannot reach intranet from home wifi
body: Internet works at home but the internal wiki and Jira never open
resolution: Reconnected the split tunnel profile and refreshed route policy

title: Meeting room wifi connected no internet
body: Laptop shows connected in the office but websites never load
resolution: Restarted the access point and cleared the stale DHCP lease

title: File server share is slow over VPN
body: Opening team files from home takes several minutes
resolution: Optimized the remote file path and enabled regional cache routing

title: Shared drive says access denied
body: Finance folder is visible but the user cannot open the files
resolution: Added the user to the finance read group and forced permission sync

title: New teammate cannot access onboarding docs
body: Docs portal shows forbidden after the first sign in
resolution: Assigned the docs viewer role and reissued SSO group claims

title: Project folder opens read only
body: Engineer can view the folder but cannot save changes to it
resolution: Corrected the project write group and refreshed the ACL mapping

title: Printer offline on floor 3
body: Printer appears online but jobs remain stuck in queue
resolution: Restarted the spooler service and cleared the print queue

title: PDF prints as blank pages
body: Invoices print successfully but every page comes out empty
resolution: Reinstalled the printer driver and switched to the universal PCL driver

title: Label printer drops random jobs
body: Shipping labels disappear before they reach the printer
resolution: Updated the print server mapping and replaced the faulty USB bridge

title: Outlook search misses recent mail
body: User cannot find emails from this week in Outlook search
resolution: Rebuilt the Outlook index and repaired the cached mailbox

title: Cannot send email to external partner
body: Mail bounces only when messages go outside the company
resolution: Removed the blocked relay rule and reran the message trace

title: Suspicious email asking for password
body: User reports a message that looks fake and asks for sign in credentials
resolution: Quarantined the email and enrolled the user in phishing reporting

title: Software install blocked by admin rights
body: Approved design tool cannot be installed by the user
resolution: Published the application from endpoint manager with elevated policy

title: Build agent out of disk space
body: CI runner fails during package restore because storage is full
resolution: Expanded the agent volume and removed stale build cache

title: Spreadsheet export downloads empty file
body: Report export finishes but the downloaded spreadsheet has no rows
resolution: Fixed the report filter mapping and regenerated the export job
